purpose: Constrain the official Figma output generated from a validated interaction model and manifest template.

rules.manifestOnly: Render only through the manifest scaffold renderer and cloned template prototypes.
rules.contentFirst: Preserve complete interaction content. Split generated scripts by module/interface row instead of truncating notes, wireframe elements, states, feedback, modal, toast, or AI待确认 content.
rules.llmOwnsContent: LLM owns PRD interpretation, 1.0 product positioning, 3.0 player-flow drawing, 4.0 low-fidelity interface drawing, right-side notes, and AI待确认. Code owns scaffold, template boundaries, style locks, validator, and gate.
rules.noFallbackNodes: Forbidden fallback node names must not appear in visible output.
rules.noTemplateResidue: Visible template placeholders such as 注释内容, 动效描述, 备注内容（非必须）, 界面名称, 原型, or 副标题 must fail validation.
rules.dynamicLayout: 4.0 interface rows, modules, footer, and board height must move according to actual rendered content height and must not overlap.
rules.styleLocked: 1.0-4.0 major titles, 3.0 flow names, 4.0 major/sub/interface titles, top floating header, discipline labels, and numbered note text must preserve template style; text content may change.
rules.wireframesAreInterfaces: Low-fidelity wireframes must be LLM-drawn plausible player-visible interfaces with controls, states, feedback, and action closure, not generic region labels or rule cards.
rules.flowDetailTraceability: Every 3.0 flow node must trace to a 4.0 interface or state, and 4.0 must expand every referenced player-visible interface/state.
rules.countsMatchModel: Rendered flow nodes, flow edges, feature interface rows, wireframes, notes, and AI待确认 notes must match the validated model.
rules.modelStored: The board must store the validated interaction model or its hash in shared data.
rules.semanticReviewRequired: Validator pass is structural only; LLM semantic review from interaction-designer and player perspectives is required before delivery.
